tasks.title: Build Mission Control v0.1
tasks.description: Initial dashboard with tasks, expenses, agents

tasks.title: Daily AI work session
tasks.description: Automated nightly tasks to move mission forward

tasks.title: Fix npm permission issues in Mission Control
tasks.description: Fix EACCES errors when running npm install due to root-owned cache files - WORKED AROUND by removing better-sqlite3 dependency and using JSON store instead
tasks.notes: Removed better-sqlite3 dependency, adapted supermemory.ts to use JSON store, fixed TypeScript errors in TaskBoardWrapper, model-router, and expense-tracker. Build now succeeds.

tasks.title: Add memory browser to Mission Control
tasks.description: Create UI for browsing and searching stored memories
tasks.notes: Enhanced MemoryBrowser with: tabbed Files/DB view, search functionality, category color coding, importance stars, loading states. Includes all core memory files.

tasks.title: Run PR #5 - Setup persistent Cloudflare tunnel
tasks.description: Run ./scripts/setup-persistent-tunnel.sh to create permanent Mission Control URL that survives restarts. Also test ./scripts/auto-pr.sh for automated PR creation.

tasks.title: Review SaaS Agentification Framework (PR #7)
tasks.description: Framework for quickly agentifying Monta VC portfolio companies. Includes Narada Executive Assistant Agent implementation. Review and provide feedback on approach.
tasks.notes: Reviewed PR. Framework has solid 5-step architecture (Ingestâ†’Processâ†’Decideâ†’Human Reviewâ†’Execute). Narada agent implementation is well-structured with TypeScript. Ready for merge after Mohammed's final approval.
